properties.detail: IRGC fired on all 3 ships, seized 2 (MSC-Francesca and Epaminondas), redirected to Iranian coast. Accused of AIS manipulation and operating without authorization. UKMTO confirmed attacks. Hours after Trump ceasefire extension.

Trump tells Fox News' Martha MacCallum: 'no time frame' for ending war; denies midterms driving decisions; says Iran losing $500M/day from blockade; blockade 'absolutely destroying Iran'. Leavitt: 'no firm deadline' for Iranian proposal.

Iran President Pezeshkian says Tehran 'open to deal' but accuses US of 'unconstructive and contradictory signals'. Cites 'deep historical mistrust'. Blockade is main obstacle. First moderate signal from Iran leadership since IRGC/Ghalibaf 'waste of time' rejection.

properties.note: 6th consecutive day of major swings. Physical crude still much higher.
Equities and oil moving in opposite directions — stocks cheer ceasefire while oil fears supply disruption

properties.participants: Israel (Yechiel Leiter), Lebanon (Nada Moawad), US (Marco Rubio, Mike Huckabee, Michel Issa, Michael Needham)
properties.purpose: extend ceasefire beyond Apr 26 expiry, build on Apr 14 first round

properties.detail: Iran Ambassador Reza Amiri Moghadam meets PM Sharif to discuss regional situation and peace efforts. Pakistan continues mediation despite Iranian media questioning neutrality.
